description: Home island seed + scale contract — Driftwood Bay & Ironfang Spire size foundations, organized realistic nature, Railway SSOT, R2 glTF, 2m character

authority.database: home_islands (Postgres on Railway) — NOT Cloudflare D1

sizeFoundations.rule: Driftwood Bay + Ironfang Spire are the only size foundations for player home islands. Both use worldSizeM=1024 and characterHeightM=2.

driftwood_bay.label: Driftwood Bay
driftwood_bay.summary: Coastal foundation: broad shore, bay indent, moderate elevation

ironfang_spire.label: Ironfang Spire
ironfang_spire.summary: Highland foundation: steeper relief, tighter beach, dominant spire

natureAssets.policy: No low-poly / polygon megakit (CommonTree, TwistedTree, DeadTree, Rock_Medium, Pine_*, nature-megakit). Organized R2 under /models/nature/realistic/*.
natureAssets.interimNote: Until realistic GLBs are uploaded, harvest + scatter use environment multi-mesh packs only — never Quaternius megakit scatter props.

notes.natureScatter: rtsNatureScatter v2 — organized assets only; isBannedNaturePath gate in client scatter
notes.puterKv: grudge:island:{id}:state is cache; Railway home_islands.state is SSOT
notes.specVersion: 2.2.0 — see GET /api/island/spec on Railway game-data API
notes.d1: Cloudflare D1 is ObjectStore meta/assets registry — island seeds live in Railway home_islands
notes.studioEditor: Primary design surface for high-quality biome placement; seed remains deterministic for runtime
notes.ai: CreatureBrain wildlife, AllyController navmesh, OrcBossAI for PvE bosses
notes.foundations: Coastal biomes resolve to Driftwood Bay; highland/cold/dark to Ironfang Spire

characterScale.rule: All props/animals/GLBs fit relative to CHARACTER_REFERENCE_HEIGHT_M

pipeline: Island3DEngine home play + mountain triad portal
